description: Auth and data routes exist, but recheck hooks and negative tests are incomplete.

expected_validation_signals.impact: Security-sensitive path lacks reproducibility hooks for reliable verification.
expected_validation_signals.recommended_action: Add deterministic replay or targeted regression test for login/session checks.

expected_validation_signals.impact: Positive tests exist but adversarial cases are missing.
expected_validation_signals.recommended_action: Add invalid token, stale session, and ownership boundary negative tests.

expected_validation_signals.impact: CI does not re-run security checks after auth-sensitive changes.
expected_validation_signals.recommended_action: Run targeted security scan and test suite in CI for auth route changes.
